assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: Configuration shows --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades for BFCM period and explicitly states the 30-day maximum limitation

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: Configuration shows --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades for June code freeze with chaining example for longer periods

assertions.expectation: For permanent minor version control: uses 'no minor upgrades' (scope 'no_minor') if they only want to block minor versions, or 'no minor or node upgrades' (scope 'no_minor_or_node') if they also want to stop node upgrades. May recommend persistent exclusion with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support which auto-tracks EoS date
assertions.reason: Uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support flag for persistent exclusion that auto-tracks EoS

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'No upgrades exclusions are limited to 30 days maximum' and explains the until-end-of-support behavior for minor version exclusions

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: All three configurations include specific gcloud commands with the correct --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags (no_upgrades and no_minor_or_node_upgrades)

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: Only mentions 'Maximum 3 exclusions per cluster' but does not specify the 48h maintenance window requirement in any 32-day period for 'no upgrades' exclusions

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'Manual upgrades bypass ALL exclusions - you can always upgrade manually even with active exclusions'

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Does not warn about risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods, only mentions EoS protection
